mainEntity.name: What is "medical stability" and when does it end temporary benefits in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What is "medical stability" and when does it end temporary benefits in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical stability (MMI) is when injuries won't improve further; temporary benefits end, shifting to permanent partial disability rating by impairment evaluator[1][3].

suggestedAnswer.text: In South Salt Lake claims, reaching Maximum Medical Improvement (MMI) triggers impairment ratings for ongoing payments. Insurers rush MMI to cut costs—dispute with independent eval. Process: doctor certifies, panel rates body parts. Affects Murray-area cases[1][3].

name: What is MMI in South Salt Lake Workers Comp
